ok, sorry, I was just, I was just doing it on my computer so I it was a little busy but um yeah, I track that and then for our comp so I'll pull everything on, you know, co star that's close so I can see the pictures that, you know, can come to our project.
Then I'll go on that properties website, all their rents and I have a general comparison page that will spit out, you know, charts and among other things.

Ok.

What are you personally struggling with or what would you like to see different?
I mean, personally, i it's a, it's a result of having 71 properties.

No, just setting rents in general.
Um

And I tend to think that's more the issue then our rents because oftentimes when I pull our rents, compare them to comps, it's, you know, we're either on par or slightly below, but we're still struggling occupancy least percentage wise.
Right.
Right.
So I would love to be able to identify operational issues by
using your guys' data to show us where we should be at rent wise.
Definitely.
Ok.

I appreciate you sharing.
